title: corrigiola litoralis subsp. imbricata
intro: Corrigiola litoralis subsp. imbricata, also known as Limestone Knotgrass or Small Knotgrass, is a type of flowering plant in the mallow family. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Its medicinal properties are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its health-promoting properties.
